output.level_rationale: Title "Manager" in Strategy & Operations at an unknown-stage company is a weak anchor for L4. no role scope details (team size, reporting line, budget ownership, cross-functional reach) provided to calibrate. JD contains only metadata and no actual responsibilities. Confidence is very low due to missing context.

Role title and department (Strategy & Operations) suggest L4-L5 range, but insufficient detail on actual scope, decision rights, and team structure.
